subject: Include new ProvMnS enpoints in K6 performance testing
commit_message:
Include new ProvMnS enpoints in K6 performance testing

- Reduce legacy load to 20% of orignial load
- Adding 2 scenarios (Read & Write)
- Testing write without policy executor

Issue-ID: CPS-3133
Change-Id: Ic9b81bc3aad56fb42f408daf42150b87b498e68b
Signed-off-by: seanbeirne <sean.beirne@est.tech>
